channel.title: Posts on // W4UGH // Adventures in Engineering //
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on // W4UGH // Adventures in Engineering //

item.title: My First IPFS Blog Post
item.description: This is my first post!! Well first post to this block. I retired my old blog after letting it limp along for years. I’m ready for a new fresh start. So I figured why not use IPFS and Hugo? I’m pretty sure it should be easy to do. Though I’m seeing that Jekyll might be better. I’m not well versed in Ruby so I’m trying to avoid it.
